---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

What capability do you want to add or improve?

## Motivation

Why would this make the public LogicPearl core more useful?

## Scope

Please describe whether this affects:
- runtime
- IR/schema
- observer tooling
- renderers
- public demos
- docs

## Notes

If the request is highly domain-specific, please explain how it can remain generic.
